$doc: Each project type (backend/mobile/frontend) can provide its own config. This default covers Java/Kotlin backend (MOA/Dubbo/gRPC/Kafka) and mobile (Retrofit).

rpcProviders.$doc: Annotations that mark a class/method as an RPC service provider

rpcConsumers.$doc: Annotations that mark a field/injection as an RPC consumer reference

eventSubscribers.$doc: Annotations that mark a method as an event/message subscriber

httpClient.$doc: HTTP client framework annotations for REST endpoint extraction

kgEdgeTypes.$doc: KG edge types used for graph-based endpoint extraction

implicitConsumers.$doc: Heuristic rules for detecting implicit RPC consumers not annotated directly

internalClassTags.$doc: KG tags that indicate an internal/non-endpoint class (should be skipped)
